app.name: Live SLIDE CENTER
app.tagline: Centralized presentation management for live events

auth.goToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.errorGeneric: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.errorSessionRefresh: Could not refresh your session after sign-up. Please try again in a moment or sign in with the same email.
auth.errorTenantProvisioning: Your tenant workspace is not yet present on the access token. Wait a few seconds and try again, or sign in with the same email.
auth.signupCheckEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to the address you provided. After you confirm your email, sign in to finish tenant activation and refresh your access token.
auth.errorLoginRefresh: Could not confirm your access profile after sign-in. Please try again.
auth.errorTenantMissingLogin: Your access profile does not include the organization (tenant) required for Slide Center. Contact your administrator or use a different account.
auth.errorTenantSuspendedLogin: This organization has been suspended. Contact Live Slide Center support.
auth.tenantSuspendedBody: Access to Slide Center for your tenant has been disabled by the platform administrator. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

event.title: Event
event.name: Event name
event.listIntro: Events for your organization (RLS-isolated). Create an event to start the workflow.
event.emptyList: No events yet. Use the form above to create one.
event.dateOrderError: End date must be on or after the start date.
event.notFound: Event not found or not accessible for your account.
event.deleteCascadeHint: Deleting this event permanently removes all linked rooms, sessions, speakers, and presentations (PostgreSQL ON DELETE CASCADE).
event.networkModeHint_cloud: Each room PC connects via the internet. Files are downloaded directly from Supabase Storage via the PWA.
event.networkModeHint_intranet: Local network (own router). Files are distributed through a Local Agent and Room Agents installed on each room PC.
event.networkModeHint_hybrid: LAN with cloud fallback. The Room Agent uses the Local Agent when reachable, otherwise falls back to Supabase.

errors.missingTenant: No tenant on this session. Sign out and sign in again, or contact support.
errors.invalidRoute: Invalid event id in the URL.

export.sectionIntro: Download a ZIP of each speaker’s current on-air slide file (ready versions only), a UTF-8 CSV of this event’s activity log, and a PDF summary (metadata only; binaries are not embedded).
export.zipAria: Export ZIP archive of current slide files
export.csvAria: Export CSV of this event’s activity log
export.pdfAria: Export PDF summary report for this event
export.errorZipEmpty: No ready files to include in the ZIP. Upload and finalize at least one presentation.
export.errorZipFailed: ZIP creation failed. Check your network and try again.
export.pdfActivityRows: Log rows also available as CSV: {{count}}.
export.pdfFooter: Live Slide Center — metadata export. Original slide binaries are in the dedicated ZIP.

tenantQuota.sectionAria: Subscription usage and plan limits for your organization
tenantQuota.storageMeterAria: Storage used as a percentage of the plan limit
tenantQuota.eventsMonthHint: Events are counted by start date in the current calendar month ({{month}}), in your browser's local timezone.
tenantQuota.eventDetailIntro: Organization storage and the room limit for this event (per your subscription).
tenantQuota.eventsAtCap: You have reached the monthly event limit for your plan. Upgrade the plan or wait until next month.
tenantQuota.roomsAtCap: You have reached the maximum number of rooms for this event under your plan.
tenantQuota.loadErrorNoRow: Organization limits are unavailable. Try again or contact support.

errors.eventsPerMonthExceeded: Cannot create the event: the monthly event limit for your plan has been reached.
errors.roomsPerEventExceeded: Cannot add another room: the per-event room limit for your plan has been reached.

billing.title: Subscription & plan
billing.intro: Payments and checkout are handled through Lemon Squeezy in the Live WORKS APP ecosystem, as defined in the master project guide. Here you can review the active plan, quotas, and any checkout URLs configured via Vite environment variables. Only tenant administrators can open this page.
billing.plansSectionIntro: Figures match `plans.ts` and the definitive guide (§12). Checkout opens in a new tab when Lemon Squeezy URLs are configured.
billing.actionsSectionIntro: Buttons appear only when `VITE_LEMONSQUEEZY_*` variables are set in the monorepo root `.env` file.
billing.checkoutEnvMissing: No checkout or portal URL is configured yet: add the Lemon Squeezy variables to `.env` when the Live WORKS store is wired up.
billing.enterpriseActiveHint: Enterprise plan active: billing and changes go through your dedicated agreement and support.
billing.enterpriseContactHint: For a tailored Enterprise plan, contact sales via Live WORKS APP or Live Slide Center support.

room.title: Room
room.name: Room name
room.eventDetailIntro: Rooms linked to this event (create, inline edit of name/type, delete). Data is tenant-isolated (RLS).
room.emptyEventList: No rooms yet — add one using the form above.
room.deleteCascadeHint: Deleting this room also removes linked sessions and speakers (PostgreSQL ON DELETE CASCADE).

errors.missingContext: Incomplete context for this room. Reload the page.
errors.nameRequired: The room name cannot be empty.

session.title: Session
session.roomUnknown: Room not found in the current list
session.eventDetailIntro: Sessions per room: create, inline edit (title, room, type, schedule), drag-and-drop reorder (persisted display_order), optional By room read-only schedule view, and two-step delete.
session.emptyEventList: No sessions yet — add one using the form above.
session.needRoomFirst: Create at least one room in the section above before adding sessions.
session.deleteCascadeHint: Deleting this session also removes linked speakers (PostgreSQL ON DELETE CASCADE).
session.byRoomIntro: Sessions grouped by room and sorted by start time (read-only — edit from the list view).
session.dragListHint: Drag the ⋮⋮ handle next to a session and drop it on another row to update the list order (saved to the database).
session.reorderFailed: Could not save the new session order

errors.scheduleOrder: The scheduled end must be on or after the scheduled start.
errors.missingContext: Incomplete session context. Reload the page.
errors.titleRequired: The session title cannot be empty.

speaker.title: Speaker
speaker.eventDetailIntro: Speakers per session: create, inline edit (session, name, email), plus portal link and QR (90-day validity) for new records. Resumable uploads (TUS) are planned for Phase 3.
speaker.emptyEventList: No speakers yet — add one using the form above.
speaker.needSessionFirst: Create at least one session in the section above before adding speakers.
speaker.sessionUnknown: Session not found in the current list
speaker.copyUploadLinkFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard. Select the link manually.
speaker.uploadQrAria: QR code for the upload link for {{name}}
speaker.uploadLinkMissing: This speaker has no portal link yet (legacy record). Generate a link or delete and recreate the speaker.

csvImport.title: CSV import
csvImport.hint: UTF-8 file with a header row: session_title, full_name, email (optional). The session title must match exactly one session in this event (case-insensitive, trimmed). Maximum 200 data rows per import.
csvImport.fileAriaLabel: Select a CSV file to import speakers
csvImport.partialFailure: Import stopped after {{imported}} of {{total}} speaker(s). Reason: {{reason}}

errors.emptyFile: The file is empty or contains no data rows.
errors.tooManyRows: This import exceeds the limit of {{max}} data rows.
errors.ambiguousSession: Line {{line}}: multiple sessions share the title "{{title}}" — rename a session to make titles unique.

errors.nameRequired: The speaker name cannot be empty.

uploadPortal.intro: Upload your presentation here. Every new upload creates a new version — history is preserved automatically.
uploadPortal.invalidReasonInvalidToken: The upload code in this link is not valid.
uploadPortal.invalidReasonNotFound: No active invitation matches this link.
uploadPortal.invalidReasonExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new invitation from the organizer.
uploadPortal.invalidGeneric: This link cannot be used right now.
uploadPortal.dropzoneTitle: Drop a file here or pick one
uploadPortal.successBody: Your presentation has been recorded as version {{version}}. You can upload an update at any time: a new version will be created.
uploadPortal.errorTooLarge: File too large. Max allowed size: {{size}}.
uploadPortal.errorQuotaExceeded: Tenant storage quota exceeded. Please contact the organizer.
uploadPortal.errorNetwork: Network error. Upload will resume automatically.
uploadPortal.noticeResumable: This upload is resumable: if the network drops you can continue from where you left off.

versions.title: Version history
versions.reviewerNotePlaceholder: Internal notes for {{name}} (not visible to the speaker).

validation.dateEndBeforeStart: The end date must be on or after the start date.

admin.dashboardIntro: Cross-tenant aggregate indicators (metadata and volumes). No presentation file content (GDPR). Navigate to tenants and audit from here.
admin.dashboardCardEventsHint: Count of events in setup or active status.
admin.dashboardCardStorageHint: Sum of storage_used_bytes across all tenants.
admin.dashboardMtdPlaceholder: MTD revenue: not connected yet (Phase 11 billing).
admin.dashboardMtdHint: Lemon Squeezy and financial reporting are planned in the monetization roadmap.
admin.tenantsIntro: Tenant metadata: plan, slug, storage usage. No presentation files (GDPR).
admin.tenantDetailQuotasIntro: Edit commercial limits (super_admin RLS). Use whole numbers; storage in bytes (≤ 0 with enterprise plan = unlimited storage enforcement).
admin.tenantDetailStorageLimitHint: Example 5368709120 = 5 GiB. ≤ 0 with enterprise is treated as unlimited by the storage quota trigger.
admin.tenantDetailMaxNumericHint: 0 = unlimited in tenant UI when enterprise applies
admin.tenantDetailQuotaInvalid: Enter valid numbers (non-negative integers for events and rooms; numeric storage).
admin.tenantDetailAccessBody: Suspend access for all tenant users (tenant login and dashboard blocked). Super-admins are unaffected.
admin.tenantSuspendConfirm: Suspend this organization? Users cannot sign in until you reactivate.
admin.tenantDetailTeamIntro: Users linked to the tenant (email and role). No invitations are sent from this screen.
admin.tenantDetailTeamEmpty: No rows in public.users for this tenant.
admin.tenantDetailEventsIntro: Name, dates, and status only — no room content or files.
admin.tenantDetailLogIntro: Latest 50 activity_log rows for this tenant.
admin.auditIntro: Latest 200 rows from activity_log (all tenants). Tenant column links to tenant detail for context.

config.supabaseMissingSubtitle: To use sign-in and live data in development, set your project URL and the anonymous public API key.
config.supabaseMissingStep1: At the monorepo root, copy `.env.example` to `.env` (never commit `.env`).
config.supabaseMissingStep2: In Supabase: Settings → API. Paste Project URL into `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` and the anon public key into `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`.
config.supabaseMissingStep3: Save `.env` and restart the dev server (`pnpm run dev`).
config.supabaseMissingNote: Without these variables the browser client cannot reach the backend — this is expected, not a UI defect.

liveView.loadError: Unable to load the control room view
liveView.noRooms: No rooms configured for this event.
liveView.noActivity: No activity recorded for this event.

panel.title: Room PCs
panel.sectionIntro: Pair room computers to display the file manager in real time.

list.empty: No paired PCs for this event.
list.revokeConfirm: Remove device {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

pairing.title: Pair Room PC
pairing.waitingForDevice: Waiting for the technician to enter the code…

pair.title: Pair this PC
pair.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code shown in the event panel.
pair.errorExpired: Code expired. Request a new code from the organizer.
pair.errorUsed: Code already used. Request a new code.
pair.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts from this network. Wait a minute and try again.

roomPlayer.noFiles: No files uploaded for this room.

fileSync.pickFolderTitle: Select a folder to save files
fileSync.pickFolderHint: Choose a folder on this PC: presentation files will be downloaded automatically as soon as they are available.
fileSync.notSupported: Automatic local download requires Chrome 86+ or Edge 86+. Please use a compatible browser.

errors.offline_cloud: No internet: cloud download unavailable. Restore connectivity or use LAN with the Local Agent.
errors.no_lan_agent: Intranet mode: no online Local Agent registered for this event. Start the agent on the control PC or switch the event to cloud/hybrid.
errors.permission_denied: Write permission to the folder was denied.

connectivity.offlineBanner: No internet connection detected. If LAN and the Local Agent are up, room downloads may still work (intranet/hybrid).

route.hintLanPrimary: Primary download from Local Agent over LAN.
route.hintLanNoInternet: No internet: attempting LAN download if the agent is reachable.
route.hintFullOffline: No connectivity and no known LAN agent: limited functionality.
route.hintHybrid: LAN when available; otherwise automatic fallback to cloud.
route.hintHybridCloudOnly: No LAN agent registered: cloud download only.
route.hintNoAgent: Intranet without an online agent: connect the Local Agent or change the event network mode.

error.invalidToken: Invalid token. Please pair this PC again.
error.noRoom: No room assigned to this device.

settings.pageIntro: Interface preferences stored in this browser (language, Live Software ecosystem shortcuts, and future options).
settings.languageHint: Your choice is saved in this browser (localStorage) and overrides automatic browser detection.
settings.languageAutoNote: If you do not change the language, the browser language is used when it is Italian or English; otherwise Italian is the default.
settings.integrationsIntro: Quick links to other suite apps (desktop or web). Live data integrations (control-room session state, countdowns, crew assignments) are planned for upcoming releases.
settings.integrationsTimerBody: Speaker timers and in-room session countdowns—ideal alongside Slide Center during congresses and live shows.
settings.integrationsTimerEnvHint: To show the launch link, set VITE_LIVE_SPEAKER_TIMER_URL in the monorepo root `.env` (URL to the installable Timer build or download page).
settings.integrationsCrewBody: Technician assignments and on-site crew coordination. Deeper Slide Center integration is on the roadmap.
settings.integrationsApiBody: Documented REST endpoints for external automation (CMS, registration, customer dashboards). Not yet exposed in production.
